## Kique Drayton, Sr. Obituary

Kique James Drayton, Sr., 37, of Conway, passed away unexpectedly Saturday, July 8, 2017. A native of Allentown, Pennsylvania, Kique was born August 8, 1979 as the son of Mrs. Yvette R. Drayton Castro and the late Mr. Hector E. Rosario.

Along with his father, he was also preceded in death by an uncle, Steven G. Makdesi, by a brother, Devon Rosario, and by three angel babies.

Kique loved his children, cooking, fixing anything he touched, and making beautiful babies with his wife, Heather. He never missed a beat in his children and wife’s lives. Mr. Drayton also loved going to the beach, and spending every holiday together with his family, making sure to light every birthday candle, and endlessly reciting his wedding vows.

Along with his mother, Mr. Drayton is survived by his beautiful wife, Heather Marie Drayton of Conway; four amazing sons, Brenden, Kique Jr., Jaeden, and Zaevion; three gorgeous daughters, Justice, Laelani, and Kaelani- all who were the loves of his life. As well as a large, loving extended family.

Funeral Services for Kique will be privately held at The Church of the Resurrection. The family asks that memorial contributions be made in Kique’s name to Heather and the children to assist with funeral expenses.

A special thanks to all friends, family and neighbors who have reached out offering their love, care support and prayers during this difficult time.

Those who wish, may view the Memorial Page and sign the Guestbook online at: [www.burroughsfh.com](https://www.burroughsfh.com/%22http://www.burroughsfh.com/%22)

Burroughs Funeral Home and Cremation Services of Murrells Inlet, (843.651.1440) is assisting the Drayton family with the arrangements
